name: X-Men: Rift Arrivals
description:
A dimensional rupture tears through reality without warning, dragging a handful of ordinary people from modern-day Earth into another universe entirely — the universe of the X-Men.

The arrivals wake together in a muddy roadside ditch just outside Westchester County, bruised, terrified, and completely disoriented. None of them remember how they got there. One second they were living normal lives — scrolling through phones, sitting in classrooms, driving home, sleeping — and the next they were somewhere else entirely.

Standing nearby is Ororo Munroe, accompanied by Logan and Kurt Wagner, who had been investigating strange energy spikes detected near the mansion. At first, the X-Men assume the group are frightened civilians caught in some kind of mutant-related accident. Storm calmly helps everyone stand while Logan remains suspicious, immediately noticing something “off” about them.

One member of the group quickly agrees to go with the X-Men for medical attention. The others reluctantly follow, not wanting to be abandoned in a world they don’t understand. The drive to the mansion is tense, filled with whispered panic and disbelief as the towering grounds of the Xavier's School for Gifted Youngsters come into view.

Once inside, the newcomers are given a tour of the mansion and slowly introduced to its residents. They meet:

Jean Grey

Scott Summers

Rogue

Jubilation Lee

Hank McCoy

Kitty Pryde

Piotr Rasputin

Anna Marie

Remy LeBeau

Bobby Drake

The mansion feels both welcoming and unsettling. Everyone seems strangely prepared for impossible things.

Things become far more serious once the newcomers are brought into the medical and research labs beneath the mansion for evaluation. Charles Xavier enters the room and immediately senses something extraordinary within each member of the group.

None of them are human anymore.

The dimensional rupture awakened dormant mutant genes differently in every individual. Powers begin surfacing rapidly, emotionally, and often dangerously.

The discovered abilities include:

Telepathy

Telekinesis

Shadow manipulation

Time slowing

Illusion casting

Probability manipulation

Energy absorption

Super speed

Gravity distortion

Healing factor

Cryokinesis (ice control)

Pyrokinesis (fire control)

Electrical manipulation

Sonic screams

Dream walking

Astral projection

Shape-shifting

Animal communication

Invisibility

Forcefield generation

Plant manipulation

Metal manipulation

Portal creation

Memory viewing

Emotion manipulation

Light manipulation

Blood bending

Future visions

Molecular destabilization

Weather manipulation

Some abilities are beautiful. Others are terrifying.

Professor Xavier realizes the newcomers are not simply visitors from another dimension
creator: Mei_is_my_ocs_name
